description: Operator noticed strip edge curling up during slitting and coming close to his hand position. Safety guard gap was wider than specification due to wrong adjustment after blade change.
immediate_action: Machine stopped. Guard gap re-adjusted to spec (max 6mm). Operator reminded about hand position.
root_cause: Guard gap set incorrectly during previous blade change by night shift operator.
corrective_action: Guard gap measurement added to blade change checklist. Visual marking on guard for correct position.
camera_evidence: CAM-03 footage reviewed — confirmed near miss at 11:28:45

description: Operator Ravi Shankar got a minor cut on left hand index finger while handling formed tube sample. The tube had a sharp edge from incomplete scarfing.
immediate_action: First aid applied at site. Wound cleaned and bandaged. Operator continued work after 15 minutes.
root_cause: Operator not wearing cut-resistant gloves while handling sample tube. Tube had sharp weld bead remnant.
corrective_action: Mandatory cut-resistant gloves for all sample handling. Sample inspection tongs procured for each station.

description: During night shift, a hot pipe (approximately 800°C) rolled off the cooling bed onto the floor near the walkway. No person was in the immediate area at the time.
immediate_action: Area cordoned off. Pipe left to cool. Cooling bed roller alignment checked — roller #22 found to be loose, causing pipe to deflect.
root_cause: Cooling bed guide roller #22 mounting bolt had loosened due to vibration. Regular torque checks were overdue.
corrective_action: All cooling bed roller mountings re-torqued. Monthly torque check added to PM schedule. Physical barrier (steel curb) installed on walkway side of cooling bed.
camera_evidence: CAM-14 thermal camera captured the event at 03:18:22

description: Arc flash at induction coil during startup. Coil-to-tube arc damaged coil surface. No personnel injury — operators were at safe distance per SOP.
immediate_action: Welder tripped automatically. Area isolated. Coil inspected — surface damage, needs replacement.
root_cause: Tube was misaligned entering the welding zone. Entry guide had shifted after previous changeover and was not properly re-aligned.
corrective_action: Entry guide alignment verification added to changeover checklist. Proximity sensor added to detect tube misalignment before welding starts.
camera_evidence: CAM-09 recorded arc flash — 0.3 sec duration at 08:59:47

description: During coil lifting, sling slipped on one side causing the 12-ton coil to tilt approximately 15 degrees before crane operator lowered it back safely.
immediate_action: Coil lowered safely. Sling inspected — one leg had a cut strand (5% capacity reduction). Sling removed from service.
root_cause: Sling damaged by sharp coil edge during previous use. Pre-use sling inspection missed the damage (night shift crane operator).
corrective_action: All slings inspected. 3 damaged slings removed from service. Sling color-coding inspection system implemented (monthly color code change). Dedicated sling storage rack installed.
camera_evidence: CAM-01 captured the full event — 14:28:15 to 14:31:42

description: Small fire in DG set room. Oil leak from DG fuel line dripped onto hot exhaust pipe, causing localized fire. Fire detected by security camera operator and responded within 2 minutes.
immediate_action: DG set shut down. Fire extinguished using DCP extinguisher (2 units). Area ventilated. No spread to other equipment.
root_cause: Fuel flexible hose had developed a pinhole leak due to age (7 years old, recommended replacement every 5 years). Fuel dripped onto exhaust manifold.
corrective_action: All DG fuel hoses replaced. Drip tray installed under fuel connections. Fuel leak sensor installed with alarm. DG inspection schedule updated to include hose condition check.
camera_evidence: CAM-21 captured smoke at 16:38, fire visible at 16:39. Response team arrived at 16:41.

description: Coolant oil spill from forming mill coolant tank. Approximately 200 liters leaked due to tank drain valve left open after weekend maintenance.
immediate_action: Spill contained using absorbent pads and sand. Drain valve closed. Area cleaned. Coolant recovered where possible.
root_cause: Maintenance technician (EMP-021) forgot to close drain valve after tank cleaning on Saturday. No post-maintenance checklist used.
corrective_action: Post-maintenance valve status checklist created. Drain valves now require padlocks (key with shift supervisor). Spill response kit placed near all coolant tanks.
camera_evidence: CAM-07 shows liquid pool forming at 09:45, reported by operator at 10:00

description: Forklift nearly struck a pedestrian worker (EMP-036) at the intersection of packaging bay and finished goods yard. Forklift operator did not sound horn at blind corner.
immediate_action: Both workers stopped. Near-miss reported. Forklift operator reminded about horn protocol.
root_cause: Blind corner at Z6/FG yard intersection. No convex mirror. Forklift speed not reduced. Horn not sounded.
corrective_action: Convex mirror installed at blind corner. Speed bump installed. Mandatory horn at all intersections. Pedestrian-only walkway re-marked with floor paint.
camera_evidence: CAM-18 captured the event — forklift was 0.8m from worker at closest point

description: Operator EMP-016 noticed that a co-worker (EMP-035, helper) entered Zone Z5 heat treatment area without wearing the required aluminized jacket and face shield.
immediate_action: Worker immediately directed out of zone. Correct PPE issued and worn before re-entry.
root_cause: Helper was new to Z5 assignment (normally works in Z2/Z6). Not aware of zone-specific PPE requirements beyond standard gear.
corrective_action: Zone-entry PPE matrix displayed at all zone entrances. New workers receive zone-specific PPE briefing before assignment. PPE check station installed at Z5 entry.
camera_evidence: CAM-14 shows worker entering without proper PPE at 07:28

description: Fire exit B path was blocked by stacked empty pallets for approximately 13 minutes during B-shift. Supervisor noticed during routine round.
immediate_action: Pallets immediately moved to designated storage area. Path cleared.
root_cause: Material handler placed pallets in the fire exit path for convenience while organizing finished goods yard.
corrective_action: Floor markings repainted in red with 'FIRE EXIT — KEEP CLEAR' text. Designated pallet storage zone created with physical barriers. Added fire exit check to hourly safety round checklist.
camera_evidence: CAM-18 shows pallets placed at 19:08, removed at 19:21
